description_long: This irregularly shaped stone features a rugged, organic form with three prominent lobes extending from a central mass. Its surface is predominantly a pale beige with subtle variations in tone, and it displays a coarse, granular texture with occasional pitting and small indentations. The stone appears weathered, with some areas showing smoother, rounded edges and others retaining sharper, more angular protrusions. A darker band encircles part of the stone, possibly indicating mineral staining or partial burial in soil. The overall form is asymmetrical, with no clear flat surfaces, making it visually distinct and naturalistic. Such a stone could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped sidewalk.
description: An irregular, pale beige stone with a coarse, weathered surface and three prominent lobes, featuring a darker band and natural textural variations.
description_view_0: From this view, the stone's three-lobed structure is prominent, with a visible dark band wrapping around one lobe and a rough, pitted surface.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the elongated central mass and the rounded ends of the lobes, with smoother surface areas and less visible banding.
description_view_2: The stone appears broader and flatter from this perspective, emphasizing the asymmetry and the natural undulations of its surface.
description_view_3: Looking down on the stone, the irregular topography and subtle color variations are most apparent, with the central mass dominating the view.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle mottling and granular texture with a darker band; no regular or artificial patterns present.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered with smoothed edges and some pitting, indicating prolonged exposure to natural elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil or gravel, may partially contrast with manicured lawns or paved surfaces, and could be partially embedded or surrounded by low vegetation.
